name: conditional border renders 3px while the value condition is TRUE
conditional border renders no border while the condition is FALSE
conditional blur+opacity applies while the condition is TRUE
conditional filter resolves to none while the condition is FALSE
icon size 40px resizes the main icon on tile
icon size 40px resizes the main icon on entity
icon size 40px resizes the main icon on sensor
icon size 40px resizes the main icon on picture-glance
conditional icon size renders the 24px fallback while FALSE
panel round-trips border.widthWhen / filter.effectsWhen+opacity / iconColor.sizePx from generated CSS (nothing left in Advanced)
icon-size control is NOT offered on a light card
